context.intro: CO9 encompasses HALSTEAD and its surrounding areas in Essex, East Of England.
context.priceVsCounty: The average property price in CO9 is £395,792, which is 8% below the Essex average of £429,754.
context.priceVsNational: Properties in CO9 cost 37.9% more than the England and Wales average of £287,000.

context.crimeContext: With 5.0 recorded crimes per 1,000 residents, CO9 has a crime rate well 94% below the national average of 81.3 per 1,000.
context.schoolContext: CO9 has 17 schools within or near its boundaries, including 6 rated Good by Ofsted.
context.broadbandContext: Average broadband download speeds in CO9 are 312.0 Mbps, with 99% of premises having access to superfast broadband and 90% with full fibre (FTTP) connectivity.
context.synthesis: CO9 (HALSTEAD) offers above-average property prices (£395,792, 38% above national average), low crime (94% below national average), 17 nearby schools, and excellent broadband (312 Mbps average).
